Continued close view of the DIGIBOIL heated tank and its spigot; stainless steel pouring pitchers stand nearby ready to draw melted wax.
The wax melter with digital readout, a stainless pitcher in the foreground and conical funnels to the right, kraft-paper-wrapped candles lining the shelves.
Final framing of the DIGIBOIL melting tank with its temperature display, stainless pouring pitchers and funnels around it, finished candle stock on the shelves.

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring green tinted molten wax from steel pitcher into rows of black candle jars and tins, white wick-centering bars holding cotton wicks, batch of filled candles cooling, empty prepped tins
windows.summary_v2: A maker pours green-tinted molten wax from a steel pitcher into rows of black wicked candle jars, then the shot cuts to empty prepped tins awaiting their pour.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of rows of black candle jars filled with green-tinted molten wax, each wick held centered by a white wick-bar, while a steel pour pitcher dribbles wax into a jar at upper-left.
The steel pitcher continues pouring green molten wax into the front-left jar; surrounding jars sit topped off with their white centering bars across the rims.
Pitcher pours a thin stream of green wax into the corner jar; rows of freshly filled black jars with wick holders fill the frame, some still wrapped in plastic.
Continued pour into the front-left jar; glossy green wax surfaces and white wick-centering bars visible across the grid of jars.
Final moment of the pour as the pitcher tilts over the corner jar; the array of filled green-wax candles with centered wicks remains.
Cut to a closer overhead of empty black candle tins arranged in rows, each fitted with a white wick-bar and a bare metal wick tab, not yet poured.
Same set of empty silver-lined black tins with wick holders and loose wicks laid across the tabletop awaiting wax.
Static overhead of the empty prepped tins, wick bars and trailing cotton wicks ready for pouring.
Unchanged shot of the grid of empty black candle tins with centered wicks and white holders, a plastic-wrapped jar at upper right.

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring topping up black candle tins with green yellow molten wax from steel pitcher, white wick-centering bars holding cotton wicks, batch of glossy filled candles setting, overhead close-up
windows.summary_v2: A maker tops up black candle tins with green-yellow molten wax from a steel pitcher, filling the last empty tins to match the rest of the batch.

tags_v2.action: topping up candle tins with molten wax

seconds_v2.desc: Close overhead of a steel pour pitcher tipping green-yellow molten wax into a black candle tin at front-left, surrounded by tins already filled to the brim with wicks held by white centering bars.
The pitcher continues streaming molten green wax into the front-left tin, the level rising while neighboring filled tins sit glossy with centered wicks.
Steady pour from the steel pitcher fills the corner tin; trailing cotton wicks and white wick-bars span the rows of black tins.
Pour nearing completion as the front-left tin approaches full; rows of green-wax candles with centered wicks fill the frame.
Pitcher lifts slightly; the just-filled tins now match the others, all topped with green molten wax and white wick holders.
Static overhead of the filled black candle tins, surfaces glossy green, wicks centered, one tin at lower-left still showing bare silver where wax is settling.
Same grid of freshly poured green-wax tins cooling, wick bars holding the cotton wicks upright.
Unchanged overhead of the batch of topped-off candle tins with centered wicks and a plastic-wrapped jar at right.
Final static frame of the completed pour: rows of black tins filled with green wax, wicks held by white centering bars, beginning to set.
